scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w packages/frontend" "npm run dev -w packages/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w packages/api
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy -w packages/api && npm run deploy -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend && npm run typecheck -w packages/api
